description: Planka is an elegant open source project tracking tool.
changelog: Fixed a real bug: the database's data directory was nested inside DATA_ROOT, which the planka LSIO container also mounts and recursively re-owns to PUID/PGID on every start - this silently broke Postgres's own required ownership after every restart. The database now uses its own DB_DATA_ROOT path, outside DATA_ROOT entirely. Add DB_DATA_ROOT=/mnt/user/appdata/planka-db to your .env after updating.
